zh.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling是Jeffrey Dalling和Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling的女兒，於大約1480年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德。她於大約1500年與Geoffrey Fiske在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1527年在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling是Jeffrey Dalling和Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling的女儿，于大约1480年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德。她于大约1500年与Geoffrey Fiske在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1527年在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Dalling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Field Dalling or Wood Dalling in Norfolk, which was named in Old English as ‘the place of the people associated with a man named Dealla’.
patronymic from an early Middle English personal name Dalling (Old English Dealing) or perhaps from the Middle English personal name Daulin, a rhyming pet form of Rawlin ‘little Ralph’.

variants.name: Dallin
meanings: English (Surrey and Middlesex): variant of   Dalling  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling was born about 1480, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Jeffrey Dalling and Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. She married Geoffrey Fiske about 1500, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1527, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling est née environ 1480, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Jeffrey Dalling et Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Fiske environ 1500, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1527, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling wurde um 1480 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Jeffrey Dalling und Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling geboren. Sie hat um 1500 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Geoffrey Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1527 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Laxfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling è nata il circa 1480 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Jeffrey Dalling e Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. Lei sposato Geoffrey Fiske circa 1500, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1527, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Dallingは約1480年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでJeffrey DallingとMrs. Jeffrey Dallingの娘として生まれた。約1500年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでGeoffrey Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1527年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling(은)는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Jeffrey Dalling(와)과 Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Geoffrey Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Jeffrey Dalling e Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Fiske aproximadamente 1500, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1527, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling родилась около 1480 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Jeffrey Dalling и Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Fiske около 1500 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1527 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Dalling nació aproximadamente 1480, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Jeffrey Dalling y Mrs. Jeffrey Dalling. Se casó con Geoffrey Fiske aproximadamente 1500, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1527, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
